action.name: Accel_Restore_Tab
action.description:
Emitted when the Ash window manager hotkey handler handles the "Ctrl-Shift-T" shortcut that causes the most recently closed tab to be restored. Because it's related to Ash, it's ChromeOS only. This is only emitted when the Ash hotkey handler handles the shortcut, which only happens when a non-Chrome window is focussed on ChromeOS. (The launcher is an example of a non-Chrome window.) If a Chrome window was focussed on ChromeOS as the user presses the keyboard shortcut, it's handled by Chrome's keyboard shortcut handler system. In that case, the user action RestoreTab is emitted, not Accel_Restore_Tab.
It's never the case that both Accel_Restore_Tab and RestoreTab are emitted for the same keyboard shortcut press.
Note: if the last user action was to close an entire window with multiple tabs, this keyboard shortcut will cause the entire window to be restored, containing multiple tabs. This user action is only emitted once however, regardless of the number of tabs.
This is not emitted during session restore that occurs as part of startup.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: Accel_Rotate_Active_Window

If spoken feedback is toggled, the StatusArea_SpokenFeedbackEnabled or StatusArea_SpokenFeedbackDisabled actions will be recorded.

action.description: Infobar banner for an instant app has been dismissed by the user.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.BannerDismissedAppIsDefault
action.description: Infobar banner shown when opening the instant app is default has been dismissed. Infobar is shown for a default app when the user arrives on the page via intra-site navigation.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.BannerOpen
action.description: User clicked "Open App" button on the instant apps infobar.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.BannerOpenAppIsDefault
action.description: User clicked "Open App" button on an instant apps banner that was shown when opening the app was default, signaling that they were using the mobile web first, and decided to switch over to the instant app.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.BannerShown
action.description: Infobar advertising an instant app has been displayed.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.BannerShownAppIsDefault
action.description: Infobar for an instant app has been displayed when opening the app is default. Infobar is shown for a default app when the user arrives on the page via intra-site navigation.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.InstantAppsEligiblePageLoaded
action.obsolete: Deleted as of June 8, 2018
action.description: A page finished loading in Chrome that could have been loaded in an Instant App.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.LaunchedByDefault
action.description: An instant app was launched without any user prompting during a navigation within Chrome. This happens when the user has previously chosen to use the Instant App by opening it through the infobar UI.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.LaunchedFromWebsiteSettingsPopup
action.description: An instant app was launched from the page info popup.

action.name: Android.InstantApps.OpenInstantAppButtonShown
action.description: Recorded when the user opened PageInfo dialog and saw a button to launch an Instant App there.

action.name: Android.LauncherShortcut.NewIncognitoTab
action.description: User tapped on the 'New Incognito Tab' launcher shortcut option.

action.name: Android.LauncherShortcut.NewTab
action.description: User tapped on the 'New Tab' launcher shortcut option.

action.name: Android.LaunchNewIncognitoTab
action.description: An external application launched a new Chrome Incognito Tab.

action.name: Android.LifeCycle.HasPausedActivities
action.description: Chrome application has at least one paused and no running activites. Recorded when the state of the application changes.

action.name: Android.LifeCycle.HasRunningActivities
action.description: Chrome application has at least one activity in running state. Recorded when the state of the application changes.

action.name: Android.LifeCycle.HasStoppedActivities
action.description: Chrome application has at least one activity in stopped state, and none running or paused. Recorded when the state of the application changes.

action.name: Android.ManageSpace
action.description: User navigated to 'Manage Space' for Chrome from the 'Apps' category in Android settings.

action.name: Android.MergeState.ColdStart
action.description: Tab state was merged for Android N+ multi-instance during an application cold start.

action.name: Android.MergeState.Live
action.description: Tab state was merged for Android N+ multi-instance while Chrome was running (e.g. user exited multi-window mode and focused one of the Chrome activities).

action.name: Android.MultiWindowMode.Enter
action.description: The activity entered Android N multi-window mode.

action.name: Android.MultiWindowMode.Enter-SecondInstance
action.description: The second activity instance (ChromeTabbedActivity2) entered Android N multi-window mode. Recorded separately from Android.MultiWindowMode.Enter to avoid double counting when two instances are running.

action.name: Android.MultiWindowMode.Exit
action.description: The activity exited Android N multi-window mode.

action.name: Android.MultiWindowMode.Exit-SecondInstance
action.description: The second activity instance (ChromeTabbedActivity2) exited Android N multi-window mode. Recorded separately from Android.MultiWindowMode.Exit to avoid double counting when two instances are running.

action.name: Android.MultiWindowMode.MultiInstance.Enter
action.description: A second activity instance (ChromeTabbedActivity2) has been created in Android N multi-window mode.

action.name: Android.PhoneIntent
action.description: A user clicked on a telephone number link in Chrome content.

action.name: Android.Survey.ShowSurveyInfoBar
action.description: The survey infobar was displayed.

action.name: AppCloseButton_Clk
action.obsolete: Unused as of 08/2017
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: ApplicationShortcut.NewIncognitoSearchPressed
action.description: Force pressed on a springboard shortcut and tapped Incognito Search in Chrome for iOS.

action.name: ApplicationShortcut.NewSearchPressed
action.description: Force pressed on a springboard shortcut and tapped New Search in Chrome for iOS.

action.name: AppList_HomeButtonPressedTablet

action.name: AppList_ShowZeroStateSuggestions

action.obsolete: App list doesn't have voice search anymore.

action.name: AppList_WindowFocused
action.description: Emitted when the AppList has gained focus. The AppList gains focus every time it is shown to the user, so this is equivalent to being emitted when the AppList is shown to the user. This can be used in combination with launch/activation metrics to calculate the click through rate in the AppList.

action.name: AppList_ZeroStateOpenInstalledApp
action.description: User opens a suggested installed app in zero state.

action.name: Arc.Launcher.Search.OpenPlayStore.InstantApps
action.obsolete: Deprecated in favor of Apps.AppListSearchResultOpenType histogram.
action.description: Recorded when the user opens the an instant app from a Play Store app search query.

action.name: Arc.Launcher.Search.OpenPlayStore.UninstalledApps
action.obsolete: Deprecated in favor of Apps.AppListSearchResultOpenType histogram.
action.description: Recorded when the user opens the installing page of a Play Store app search result.

action.name: Arc.SmartTextSelection.Request
action.description: Recorded when a request to the ARC++ container to generate Smart Text Selection actions is made. This happens both when the user opens the Context Menu via a right-click and by selecting text via touchscreen.

action.name: ArcAppReinstall_Clicked
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: A click on an app reinstall app candidate from Arc++.

action.name: Ash_Tablet_BackGesture
action.description: User tried to swipe back from the left side of the window to go back in tablet mode.

action.name: AutoDetectChange
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: Autofill_ClearedForm
action.description: This user action is logged when a user has cleared the form after having accepted an Autofill suggestion.

action.name: Autofill_CreditCardUpload_LegalMessageLinkClicked
action.description: This user action is logged when the legal message link in the credit card upload bubble is clicked by the user.

action.name: Autofill_FilledCreditCardSuggestion
action.description: This user action is logged when the form is filled with the credit card suggestion selected by the user. This should always happen after a Autofill_SelectedSuggestion.

action.name: Autofill_FilledProfileSuggestion
action.description: This user action is logged when the form is filled with the profile suggestion selected by the user. This should always happen after a Autofill_SelectedSuggestion.

action.name: Autofill_FormSubmitted
action.obsolete: Deprecated 6/2016. Replaced by the versions with a suffix, which are more descriptive.
action.description: This user action is logged when Autofill detects a form submission.

action.name: Autofill_FormSubmitted_FilledAll
action.description: This user action is logged when Autofill detects a form submission for a form where all the fields were autofilled.

action.name: Autofill_FormSubmitted_FilledNone_SuggestionsNotShown
action.description: This user action is logged when Autofill detects a form submission for a form where Autofill suggestions were not shown.

action.name: Autofill_FormSubmitted_FilledNone_SuggestionsShown
action.description: This user action is logged when Autofill detects a form submission for a form where an Autofill suggestion was shown but no fields were filled.

action.name: Autofill_FormSubmitted_FilledSome
action.description: This user action is logged when Autofill detects a form submission for a form where some field were filled.

action.name: Autofill_FormSubmitted_NonFillable
action.description: This user action is logged when Autofill detects a form submission for a form that is not Autofillable or for a form that was filled with new information that Autofill could not predict.

action.name: Autofill_OnWillSubmitForm
action.description: This user action is logged when Autofill thinks a form is about to be submitted. The reason behind this is that some sites do not use the traditional submit flow and we miss some actual submissions because of that.

action.name: Autofill_ParsedCreditCardForm
action.description: This user action is logged when a credit card form is parsed.

action.name: Autofill_ParsedProfileForm
action.description: This user action is logged when a profile form is parsed.

action.name: Autofill_PolledCreditCardSuggestions
action.description: This user action is logged when the user interacts with an autofillable credit card field, either by clicking or by typing.

action.name: Autofill_PolledProfileSuggestions
action.description: This user action is logged when the user interacts with an autofillable profile field, either by clicking or by typing.

action.name: Autofill_SelectedSuggestion
action.description: This user action is logged when a user has selected (clicked on) an Autofill suggestion. This should always happen after Autofill_Showed(CreditCard|Profile)Suggestion.

action.name: Autofill_ShowedCreditCardSuggestions
action.description: This user action is logged when the user is shown some credit card suggestions. This should always happen after a Autofill_PolledCreditCardSuggestion.

action.name: Autofill_ShowedHttpNotSecureExplanation
action.obsolete: Deprecated 5/2018 because the feature never launched.
action.description: This user action is logged when the user selects a "Login not secure" or "Payment not secure" warning item in the autofill dropdown to show more information about the warning.

action.name: Autofill_ShowedProfileSuggestions
action.description: This user action is logged when the user is shown some profile suggestions. This should always happen after a Autofill_PolledProfileSuggestion.

action.name: AutofillAddressesViewed
action.description: Recorded when user visits chrome://settings/autofill page.

action.name: AutofillCreditCardsAdded
action.description: Recorded when user adds card via chrome://settings/payments page.

action.name: AutofillCreditCardsAddedWithNickname
action.description: Recorded when user adds card with a nickname via settings page.

action.name: AutofillCreditCardsEdited
action.description: Recorded when user edits card via chrome://settings/payments page.

action.name: AutofillCreditCardsEditedWithNickname
action.description: Recorded when user edits card with a new nickname via chrome://settings/payments page.

action.name: AutofillCreditCardsViewed
action.description: Recorded when user visits chrome://settings/payments page.

action.name: BookmarkBar_ContextMenu_OpenAll
action.description:
The user opened one or more bookmarks in the Bookmarks Bar using the context menu. Distinguished from launching from e.g. the application menu or the bookmark manager. This is for opening bookmarks normally (in the same window).
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

Records clicks on the URL of download items in chrome://downloads page.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: Downloads_OpenUrlOfDownloadedItemFromContextMenu
action.description:
Records open a URL of download items in chrome://downloads page from context menu.
As of M-76, "Save link as...", "Copy link address", and "Copy link text" context menu actions no longer log this action (this was accidentally the case before M-76).
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: Extensions.ContextMenu.Hosts.LearnMoreClicked
action.description: The user clicked the "Learn more about site access" option in the runtime host permissions section of an extension's context menu. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activations.

action.name: Extensions.ContextMenu.Hosts.OnAllSitesClicked
action.description: The user clicked the "On all sites" option in the runtime host permissions section of an extension's context menu. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activations.

action.name: Extensions.ContextMenu.Hosts.OnClickClicked
action.description: The user clicked the "When you click the extension" option in the runtime host permissions section of an extension's context menu. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activations.

action.name: Extensions.ContextMenu.Hosts.OnSiteClicked
action.description: The user clicked the "On {site}" option in the runtime host permissions section of an extension's context menu, where "{site}" is the domain of the current page. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activations.

action.name: Extensions.ExtensionDisabled
action.description: The user interacted with the toggle in the chrome://extensions page to disable an extension from either the main page(card view) or detail page for a specific extension.

action.name: Extensions.ExtensionEnabled
action.description: The user interacted with the toggle in the chrome://extensions page to enable an extension from either the main page(card view) or detail page for a specific extension.

action.name: Extensions.ExtensionInstalled
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: Extensions.ExtensionUninstalled
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: Extensions.IDChangedError
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: Extensions.NtpPromoClicked
action.description: Records every time the user clicks on the extensions checkup middle slot promo link.

action.name: Extensions.RemovedDefaultInstalledExtension
action.description: User clicked the "Remove" button in the extension uninstall dialog which leads to the removal of a default installed extension.

action.name: Extensions.RemoveExtensionClick
action.description: User clicked the "Remove" button in the chrome://extensions page. This triggers the uninstallation flow which prompts the user to cancel or confirm the uninstallation.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.HostList.AllHostsToggledOff
action.description: The user activated the toggle at the top of the list of hosts in the site access section of an extension's settings page, switching it from the on state to the off state. Note: the host list is only shown on the settings page for extensions which request a list of specific hosts in their permissions.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.HostList.AllHostsToggledOn
action.description: The user activated the toggle at the top of the list of hosts in the site access section of an extension's settings page, switching it from the off state to the on state. Note: the host list is only shown on the settings page for extensions which request a list of specific hosts in their permissions.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.HostList.LearnMoreActivated
action.description: The user activated the learn more icon on the site access section of an extension's settings page, for an extension which requested a list of specific hosts in their permissions.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.HostList.SpecificHostToggledOff
action.description: The user activated a toggle next to a specific host entry in the list of hosts on the site access section of an extension's settings page, switching it from the on state to the off state. Note: the host list is only shown on the settings page for extensions which request a list of specific hosts in their permissions.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.HostList.SpecificHostToggledOn
action.description: The user activated a toggle next to a specific host entry in the list of hosts on the site access section of an extension's settings page, switching it from the off state to the on state. Note: the host list is only shown on the settings page for extensions which request a list of specific hosts in their permissions.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.ActionMenuEditActivated
action.description: The user activated the "Edit" option in the context menu for a specific host entry in the site access section of an extension's settings page.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.ActionMenuOpened
action.description: While having the site access on an extension's setting page set to "On specific sites", the user activated the three dot button on a specific host entry.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.ActionMenuRemoveActivated
action.description: The user activated the "Remove" option in the context menu for a specific host entry in the site access section of an extension's settings page.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.AddHostActivated
action.description: The user activated the link to add a new host to the list of sites an extension is allowed to access, on an extesion's settings page. Note that this is only visible and can only be activated when the extension is already set to run only on a specific list of sites.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.AddHostDialogCanceled
action.description: The user closed the dialog for adding a specific host to the list of sites an extension is allowed to access, on an extension's settings page. This can be triggered either by activating the cancel button on the dialog, or by pressing escape to dismiss it.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.AddHostDialogSubmitted
action.description: The user activated the confirmation button on the dialog for adding or editing a specific host in the list of sites an extension is allowed to access, on an extension's settings page. Note that this button is only enabled when a host pattern entered into the textbox of the dialog is valid.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.LearnMoreActivated
action.description: The user activated the learn more icon on the site access section of an extension's settings page, for an extension which requested an "all_urls" type permission.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.OnAllSitesSelected
action.description: The user changed the site access setting for an extension to the "On all sites" radio option on an extension's settings page. This is only recorded when the user choses to change to this option and not if it is automatically changed back when canceling a change to the "specific sites" option.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.OnClickSelected
action.description: The user changed the site access setting for an extension to the "On click" radio option on an extension's settings page. This is only recorded when the user choses to change to this option and not if it is automatically changed back when canceling a change to the "specific sites" option.

action.name: Extensions.Settings.Hosts.OnSpecificSitesSelected
action.description: The user changed the site access setting for an extension to the "On specific sites" radio option on an extension's settings page. Note that on changing to this selection, a dialog pops up for entering a specfic host pattern.

action.name: Extensions.Toolbar.ExtensionActivatedFromMenu
action.description: The user activated an extension from the Extensions Menu in the toolbar. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activation.

action.name: Extensions.Toolbar.ExtensionActivatedFromToolbar
action.description: The user activated an extension from the toolbar. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activation.

action.name: Extensions.Toolbar.MenuOpened
action.description: The user opened the Extensions Menu in the toolbar. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activation.

action.name: Extensions.Toolbar.MoreActionsButtonPressedFromMenu
action.description: The user activated the more actions button for an extension in the Extensions Menu. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activation.

action.name: Extensions.Toolbar.PinButtonPressed
action.description: The user changed the pin state for an extension by activating the pin button in the Extensions Menu. This is recorded for both keyboard and mouse activation.

action.name: Extensions.UninstallDialogCancelClick
action.description: User clicked the "Cancel" button in the extension uninstall dialog. This cancels the uninstallation of an extension.

action.name: Extensions.UninstallDialogRemoveClick
action.description: User clicked the "Remove" button in the chrome://extensions page uninstall dialog which leads to the removal of an extension.

action.name: Extensions.UninstallDialogReportAbuseChecked
action.description: Used checked the "Report Abuse" box and the "Remove" button in the extension uninstall dialog which leads to the removal of an extension and reports the extension for abuse.

action.name: HistoryPage_EntryLinkClick
action.description:
On desktop, user clicked a link to a URL from history on the chrome://history page to navigate to the URL.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: HistoryPage_EntryLinkRightClick
action.description:
On desktop, user right-clicked a link to a URL from history on the chrome://history page. This causes the context menu to be displayed. Sometimes the user will select an "open in" action, which would cause a navigation. Selections such as "save link as" or "copy link address" will not cause a navigation.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: IOS.DefaultBrowserFullscreenPromoMoreInfoTapped
action.description: The user tapped on the more information icon on the default browser fullscreen promo modal. iOS only.

action.name: IOS.DefaultBrowserNTPPromoTapped
action.description: The user tapped on default browser NTP promo link. iOS only.

action.name: IOS.NTP.Doodle.Tapped
action.description: Recorded when the user is tapping the doodle on the NTP. There is also a histogram (NewTabPageActioniOS::doodle), but histograms are not recorded in Breadcrumbs. iOS Breadcrumbs attaches steps the user performed in the app to crash logs. These steps can help debug causes of crashes when the stack doesn't provide enough information.

action.name: IOS.OpenIn
action.obsolete: Renamed to IOS.OpenIn.Tapped, 08/2020
action.description: Recorded when the user taps on OPEN IN... button to share the page (typically PDF).

action.name: IOS.OpenIn.Presented
action.description: Recorded when the user loads a web page containing a file that can be exported and the "Open In" toolbar is presented.

action.name: IOS.OpenIn.Tapped
action.description: Recorded when the user taps on OPEN IN... button to export the file.

action.name: IOS.PageZoom.ZoomIn
action.description: The user zoomed in on a webpage. iOS only.

action.name: IOS.PageZoom.ZoomOut
action.description: The user zoomed out on a webpage. iOS only.

action.name: IOS.PageZoom.ZoomReset
action.description: The user reset the zoom level on a webpage. iOS only.

action.name: IOS.SearchEngines.RecentlyViewed.Delete
action.description: Recorded when user deletes for recently viewed search engines. iOS only.

action.name: IOS.SearchEngines.RecentlyViewed.Edit
action.description: Recorded when user enters edit mode for recently viewed search engines. iOS only.

action.name: IOSAccountsSettingsCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Reported when Accounts Settings UI was dismissed was dismissed using swipe down gesture. iOS only.

action.name: IOSBookmarkManagerCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Recorded when a user closes bookmark manager by swiping down. iOS-only.

action.name: IOSClearBrowsingDataCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Reported when Clear Browsing Data Settings UI was dismissed using swipe down gesture. iOS only.

action.name: IOSDownloadClose
action.description: User closed Download Manager UI by tapping x button when download was not in-progress (either not started or failed).

action.name: IOSDownloadConfirmClose
action.description: User confirmed download closure by tapping "Stop" on "Stop Download?" dialog.

action.name: IOSDownloadConfirmReplace
action.description: User confirmed download replacement by tapping "OK" on "Start New Download" dialog.

action.name: IOSDownloadDoNotClose
action.description: User rejected download closure by tapping "Continue" on "Stop Download?" dialog.

action.name: IOSDownloadDoNotReplace
action.description: User rejected download replacement by tapping "Cancel" on "Start New Download?" dialog.

action.name: IOSDownloadInstallGoogleDrive
action.description: User tapped on Install Google Drive promo.

action.name: IOSDownloadOpenIn
action.description: User tapped on Open In... button after in Download Manager after download succeeded.

action.name: IOSDownloadStartDownload
action.description: User started the download in Download Manager.

action.name: IOSDownloadTryCloseWhenInProgress
action.description: User tapped x button when download was in-progress. The Download Manager did not close, but presented the confirmation dialog. See IOSDownloadConfirmClose and IOSDownloadDoNotClose actions for recording use choice.

action.name: IOSGoogleServicesSettingsCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Reported when Google Services Settings UI was dismissed using swipe down gesture. iOS only.

action.name: IOSHistoryCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Recorded when a user closes History using swipe down gesture. iOS-only.

action.name: IOSInspectPageVisited
action.description: Recorded when the user loads the chrome://inspect page on iOS.

action.name: IOSLanguagesSettingsCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Reported when Languages Settings UI was dismissed using swipe down gesture. iOS only.

action.name: IOSLaunchedByOpenInChromeIntent
action.description: User opened a URL in Chrome via Apple Shortcuts.

action.name: IOSLaunchedByOpenInIncognitoIntent
action.description: User opened a URL/a list of URLs in Chrome in Incognito mode via Apple Shortcuts.

action.name: IOSLaunchedBySearchInChromeIntent
action.description: User opened Chrome with a `Search in Chrome` Siri Shortcut.

action.name: IOSPasswordsSettingsCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Reported when Passwords Settings UI was dismissed using swipe down gesture. iOS only.

action.name: IOSReadingListCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Recorded when a user closes Reading List with swipe down gesture. iOS-only.

action.name: IOSRecentTabsCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Recorded when a user closes Recent Tabs using swipe down gesture. iOS-only.

action.name: IOSSettingsCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Reported when Settings UI was dismissed using swipe down gesture. iOS only.

action.name: IOSSyncEncryptionPassphraseSettingsCloseWithSwipe
action.description: Reported when Sync Encryption Passphrase Settings UI was dismissed using swipe down gesture. iOS only.

This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: MobileClipboardChanged
action.description:
Emitted when Chrome detects that the clipboard contains new content.
On iOS: this occurs either when Chrome enters the foreground and notices that the content of the clipboard changed, or when the users selects the omnibox and Chrome notices that the content of the clipboard changed.
On Android: this occurs when Chrome starts up or when the clipboard changes while Chrome is running (in the foreground or not).

action.name: MobileComeToForeground
action.description:
Chrome has come to the foreground. Only emitted if the foreground content is an Activity that views web content, e.g., not settings. This will be emitted everytime the Activity goes from entirely hidden to at least partially visible. Partially visible means that at least some portion of the Activity is visible, but the Activity is not interactable, e.g. being covered by the share dialog, javascript alert dialogs, the voice input dialog, etc.
Please note, this has the potential to be called many times for a given session. For further details, see the Android activity concept of onPause and onResume for a better understanding of what circumstances can trigger this.
Session tracking is based on the same visibility concept, but a session can span multiple live Android Activities, while this metric will be logged when each applicable Activity goes to the foreground (per above). Since session tracking uses onPause and onResume, this metric is also tied to that to ensure we capture the event.

action.name: MobileGoToBackground
action.description:
Chrome has gone to the background. Only emitted if the previously foregrounded content was an Activity that views web content, e.g., not settings. Chrome may be partially visible at this point, but is not directly in the foreground/interactable. Partially visible means that at least some portion of the Activity is visible, but the Activity is not interactable, e.g. being covered by the share dialog, javascript alert dialogs, the voice input dialog, etc.
Please note, this has the potential to be called many times for a given session. For further details, see the Android activity concept of onPause and onResume for a better understanding of what circumstances can trigger this.
Session tracking is based on the same visibility concept, but a session can span multiple live Android Activities, while this metric will be logged when each applicable Activity goes to the background (per above). Since session tracking uses onPause and onResume, this metric is also tied to that to ensure we capture the event.

action.name: MobileOmniboxClipboardChanged
action.obsolete: Replaced with MobileOmniboxClipboardChanged in April 2017.
action.description:
Emitted when Chrome detects that the clipboard contains a new URL.
On iOS: this occurs either when Chrome enters the foreground and notices that the content of the clipboard changed, or when the clipboard changes while Chrome is in the foreground.
On Android: this occurs when Chrome starts up or when the clipboard changes while Chrome is running (in the foreground or not).

action.name: NewTabPage.LinkOpenedFromContextMenu.WebUI
action.description:
Recorded when a link on the WebUI New Tab Page is opened via the context menu. This can include: Middle-slot promos, Doodles, the One Google Bar, shortcuts and custom background image attributions. Logged only when Google is the default search provider, as these elements only appear on the Google NTP.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: Notifications.Mute
action.description: Recorded when a user enables the message center's Do Not Disturb mode.

action.name: Notifications.Persistent.Clicked
action.description: Recorded when the main body of a persistent notification gets clicked on by the user (does not include action buttons).

action.name: Notifications.Persistent.ClickedActionButton
action.description: Recorded when one of a persistent notification's action buttons gets clicked on by the user.

action.name: Notifications.Persistent.ClickedWithoutPermission
action.description: Recorded when a persistent notification gets clicked on by the user, but the user has revoked notification permission for the origin since it was shown.

action.name: Notifications.Persistent.Closed
action.obsolete: Deprecated 10/2015. Replaced by Notifications.Persistent.ClosedByUser and Notifications.Persistent.ClosedProgrammatically.
action.description: Recorded when a persistent notification gets closed, either programmatically or by the user.

action.name: Notifications.Persistent.ClosedByUser
action.description: Recorded when a persistent notification gets closed by the user. This does not always mean that the user didn't click on the notification: both could be counted if the website doesn't close the notification on click.

action.name: Notifications.Persistent.ClosedProgrammatically
action.description: Recorded when a persistent notification gets closed programmatically.

action.name: Notifications.Persistent.Shown
action.description: Recorded when a persistent notification gets shown.

action.name: Notifications.Quiet.AnimatedIconClicked
action.description: Logs when the user clicks on the notification permission request animated icon on the omnibox, that upon being clicked, opens the permission request bubble .

action.name: Notifications.Quiet.ContinueBlockingClicked
action.description: Logged when the user clicks "Continue Blocking", a button, that upon being clicked, permanently blocks notifications for the site.

action.name: Notifications.Quiet.ManageClicked
action.description: Logs when the user clicks "Manage", which is a button, that upon being clicked, navigates the user to the notifications category settings page.

action.name: Notifications.Quiet.PermissionRequestShown
action.description: The notification permission request was shown quietly as an icon in the omnibox.

action.name: Notifications.Quiet.ShowForSiteClicked
action.description: Logs when the user clicks "Show for site", which is a button, that upon being clicked, allows the site to send notifications.

action.name: Notifications.Quiet.StaticIconClicked
action.description: Logs when the user clicks on the notification permission request static icon on the omnibox, that upon being clicked, opens the permission request bubble .

action.name: Notifications.ShowMessageCenter
action.description: Recorded when the message center screen is being presented to the user.

action.name: Notifications.ShowSettings
action.description: Recorded when the message center settings screen is being presented to the user.

action.name: Notifications.ShowSiteSettings
action.description: Recorded when a user clicks on the settings button that could be included on notification toasts.

action.name: Notifications.Unmute
action.description: Recorded when the message center's Do Not Disturb mode is disabled, either due to manual user action, or because a timed Do Not Disturb expires.

action.name: NPAPIRemovalInfobar.LearnMore
action.obsolete: Deprecated due to NPAPI removal.
action.description: Recorded when the NPAPI removal infobar link is clicked.

action.name: NPAPIRemovalInfobar.Shown
action.obsolete: Deprecated due to NPAPI removal.
action.description: Recorded when the NPAPI removal infobar is shown.

action.name: NTP_LinkOpenedFromContextMenu
action.description:
Recorded when a link on the New Tab Page is opened via the context menu. This can include: Middle-slot promos, Doodles, the One Google Bar, and custom background image attributions, but *not* shortcuts. For shortcuts see MostVisited_Clicked. Logged only when Google is the default search provider, as these elements only appear on the Google NTP.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: Overscroll_Cancelled.Reload
action.description: When vertical overscroll corresponding to the RELOAD navigation is cancelled - either because the user performed an interfering action such as pressing a key, or because the user ended the drag before the navigation threshold was passed.

action.name: PasswordManager_Autofilled
action.description: Username/password were autofilled on pageload.

action.name: PasswordManager_ChoseSubdomainPassword
action.obsolete: Introduction of Manual Fallbacks broke recording of this action.
action.description: The user submitted a form with an existing credential saved for another subdomain. For example, the user might have signed in on https://accounts.spotify.com using a credential previously saved for https://play.spotify.com.

action.name: PasswordManager_Disabled
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: PasswordManager_Enabled
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: PasswordManager_LoggedInWithNewPassword
action.obsolete: Introduction of Manual Fallbacks broke recording of this action.
action.description: The user tried to log in with an existing (possibly for another subdomain) credential but different password.

action.name: PasswordManager_LoggedInWithNewUsername
action.obsolete: Introduction of Manual Fallbacks broke recording of this action.
action.description: The user tried to log in with a completely new (possibly auto generated) credential.

action.name: PasswordManager_LoginFailed
action.description: The user submitted a password form, but the website appeared to reject the credentials. This action reflects the password manager component's logic for whether or not to offer to save a password. At the time of writing, failure means that either the form submission was canceled with a failure message, or the form submission succeeded, but the user was directed back to a page that still contained a login form.

action.name: PasswordManager_LoginFollowingAutofill
action.description: The user logged in successfully with a credential originally filled by Chrome, and either did not change the stored password at all, or authorized Chrome to update it with the current password value.

action.name: PasswordManager_LoginPassed
action.description: The user submitted a password form and the website appeared to accept the credentials. This action reflects the password manager component's logic for whether or not to offer to save a password.

action.name: PasswordManager_RemovePasswordException
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: PasswordManager_RemoveSavedPassword
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: PasswordManager_ShowedHttpNotSecureExplanation
action.obsolete: Deprecated 5/2018 because the feature never launched.
action.description: The user selected the "Login not secure" or "Form not secure" item in the password manager autofill dropdown to show more information about the warning.

action.name: PasswordManager_SyncCredentialFilledAndLoginSuccessfull
action.description: Counts the number of times when Chrome fills the user's sync account credentials, and the user logs in successfully after submitting them.

action.name: PasswordManager_SyncCredentialShown
action.description: Counts the number of times a user views the saved credentials for their sync account.

action.name: PasswordManager_SyncCredentialUsed
action.obsolete: Counted the wrong thing, http://crbug.com/635428
action.description: Counts the number of times a user submits an autofilled credential which matches their sync account.

action.name: PasswordManager_UsedNonDefaultUsername
action.obsolete: Introduction of Manual Fallbacks broke recording of this action.
action.description: The user logged in with an existing credential other than the default one. This results in the default credential being updated, to the credential that the user most recently logged in with.

action.name: PasswordProtection.Interstitial.ResetPassword
action.description: Reported when the user clicks on the reset password button on the interstitial.

action.name: RestoreTab
action.description:
Emitted anytime the most recently closed tab is restored via browser/ui/browser_tab_restorer.cc. This occurs either via the (Ctrl-Shift-T) hotkey or the tab context menu. These are cases where the user hasn't explicitly selected a recently closed tab; the user is asking that the most recently closed tab be restored. Thus, it's not recorded, for example, if the user uses three-dots menu > History > Recently Closed Tabs and selects a tab, as in this case the user has selected a recently closed tab explicitly. That case and cases like it go directly to TabRestoreService::RestoreEntryById and bypass the browser_tab_restorer code path.
Note: if the last user action was to close an entire window with multiple tabs, this RestoreTab action will cause the entire window to be restored, containing multiple tabs. This user action is only emitted once however, regardless of the number of tabs.
This is not emitted during session restore that occurs as part of startup.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: Settings.Homepage.LocationChanged_V2
action.description: Recorded once when exiting homepage settings if the user changed their homepage location. Note that this is only recorded if the homepage location actually changes. So, if for example, the user goes to the settings screen and toggles between options ultimately ending up at the original state an event will not be recorded. This metric does not capture changes caused by enterprise policy. Recorded for Android only.

action.name: SettingsAppMonitor.CheckItOut
action.description: The user clicked the "Check it out" button in the Edge promo.

action.name: SettingsAppMonitor.ChooserInvoked
action.description: The user opened the Windows Settings app's browser chooser.

action.name: SettingsAppMonitor.ChromeBrowserChosen
action.description: The user selected Chrome from the Windows Settings app's browser chooser.

action.name: SettingsAppMonitor.Initialized
action.description: The Windows Settings app monitor initialized successfully. This action can be used as an anchor representing the start of a user's interactions with the app regardless of what UX in Chrome initiated the flow.

action.name: SettingsAppMonitor.OtherBrowserChosen
action.description: The user selected a different browser from the Windows Settings app's browser chooser.

action.name: SettingsAppMonitor.PromoFocused
action.description: The Edge promo became focused.

action.name: SettingsAppMonitor.SwitchAnyway
action.description: The user clicked the "Switch Anyway" button in the Edge promo.

action.name: SettingsMenu_ExtensionsLinkClicked
action.description: The user clicked the "Extensions" external link in the settings menu (drawer).

action.name: SettingsPage.OpenAppManagement
action.obsolete: Removed in M79, replaced by the histogram AppManagement.EntryPoints.
action.description: The user clicked on the "Manage your apps" external link in the settings page.

action.name: SettingsResetBubble.LearnMore
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: SettingsResetBubble.NoThanks
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: SettingsResetBubble.Reset
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: SettingsResetBubble.Show
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: SettingsResetPrompt_Accepted
action.description: The user accepted the settings reset prompt.

action.name: SettingsResetPrompt_Canceled
action.description: The user clicked the cancel button in the settings reset prompt dialog.

action.name: SettingsResetPrompt_Declined
action.obsolete: Deprecated in M59 in April 2017 and replaced by SettingsResetPrompt_Canceled and SettingsResetPrompt_Dismissed.
action.description: The user declined the settings reset prompt.

action.name: SettingsResetPrompt_Dismissed
action.description: The user dismissed the settings reset prompt, for example by clicking the x in the top right corner or pressing the Escape key.

action.name: SettingsResetPrompt_Shown
action.description: The settings reset dialog was displayed to the user.

action.name: SharedHighlights.LinkGenerated.Error.OK
action.description: User pressed the 'OK' button on the Link Generation Error Alert dialog (iOS only).

action.name: SharedHighlights.LinkGenerated.Error.SharePage
action.description: User pressed the 'Share Page...' button on the Link Generation Error Alert dialog (iOS only).

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.BottomRowScrolled
action.obsolete: Renamed to SharingHubAndroid.ThirdPartyAppsScrolled 09/2020.
action.description: The bottom row was horizontally scrolled. Recorded only once per open share sheet.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.CopyImageSelected
action.description: The "Copy Image" option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.CopyTextSelected
action.description: The "Copy Text" option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.CopyURLSelected
action.description: The "Copy URL" option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.FirstPartyAppsScrolled
action.description: The chrome app row was horizontally scrolled. Recorded only once per open share sheet.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.GenericFaviconShown
action.description: The generic favicon was shown in the sharing hub preview. This means the link's favicon was not available.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.LinkFaviconShown
action.description: The link's favicon was shown in the sharing hub preview.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.LinkToTextSelected
action.description: The "Link to text" option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.MoreSelected
action.description: The "More..." option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.PrintSelected
action.description: The Print option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.QRCodeSelected
action.description: The "QR Code" option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.ScreenshotSelected
action.description: The "Screenshot" option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.SendTabToSelf.ChromeSettingsClicked
action.description: The user tapped the Chrome Settings button in the STTS dialog.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.SendTabToSelf.NoTargetDevices
action.description: The user tapped STTS in the sharing hub with no target devices available.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.SendTabToSelf.NotSyncing
action.description: The user tapped STTS in the sharing hub with sync disabled.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.SendTabToSelfSelected
action.description: The "Send to your devices" option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.ThirdPartyAppSelected
action.description: A third party option was selected in the sharing hub.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.ThirdPartyAppsScrolled
action.description: The third party app row was horizontally scrolled. Recorded only once per open share sheet.

action.name: SharingHubAndroid.TopRowScrolled
action.obsolete: Renamed to SharingHubAndroid.FirstPartyAppsScrolled 09/2020.
action.description: The top row was horizontally scrolled. Recorded only once per open share sheet.

action.name: SharingQRCode.DialogLaunched
action.description: User launched the QR Generator dialog (desktop platforms).

action.name: SharingQRCode.DialogLaunched.ContextMenuImage
action.description: User launched the QR Generator dialog for an image via the context menu on desktop.

action.name: SharingQRCode.DialogLaunched.ContextMenuPage
action.description: User launched the QR Generator dialog for a page via the context menu on desktop.

action.name: SharingQRCode.DownloadQRCode
action.description: User attempted to download a QR code from the share hub generator.

action.name: SharingQRCode.DownloadQRCode.Failed
action.obsolete: Removed 06/2020. Never launched.
action.description: Downloading a QR Code from the sharing dialog failed.

action.name: SharingQRCode.DownloadQRCode.Succeeded
action.obsolete: Removed 06/2020. Never launched.
action.description: Downloading a QR Code from the sharing dialog succeeded.

action.name: SharingQRCode.DownloadQRCodeMultipleAttempts
action.description: User attempted to download a QR code from the share hub generator two or more times.

action.name: SharingQRCode.EditTextField
action.description: User edited the text field for a QR code URL (desktop platforms).

action.name: SharingQRCode.FailureNotificationTapped
action.obsolete: Deprecated 6/2020
action.description: User tapped on failure notification for saving QR code image.

action.name: SharingQRCode.ScannedNonURL
action.description: QR code scanner scanned a QR code that did not contain a URL.

action.name: SharingQRCode.ScannedURL
action.description: QR code scanner scanned a QR code that contained a URL.

action.name: SharingQRCode.SuccessNotificationTapped
action.obsolete: Deprecated 6/2020
action.description: User tapped on successful notification for saving QR code image.

action.name: SharingQRCode.TabVisible.Scan
action.description: User launched, foregrounded, or switched to the QR feature's scan tab.

action.name: SharingQRCode.TabVisible.Share
action.description: User launched, foregrounded, or switched to the QR feature's generator tab.

action.description: Recorded when the user chooses to add an account to device.

action.description: Recorded when dialog is shown to resolve Google Play services error (e.g., update request).

action.name: Signin_ImpressionWithAccount_FromAvatarBubbleSignin

action.name: Signin_ImpressionWithAccount_FromBookmarkBubble
action.description: Recorded when the personalized sign-in promo is shown with an account in the bookmark bubble. (signin_metrics::AccessPoint::ACCESS_POINT_BOOKMARK_BUBBLE).

action.name: Signin_ImpressionWithAccount_FromBookmarkManager
action.description: Recorded when the personalized sign-in promo is shown with an account in the in the bookmark manager. (signin_metrics::AccessPoint::ACCESS_POINT_BOOKMARK_MANAGER).

action.description: Recorded when the personalized sign-in promo is shown with an account in the extension install bubble. (signin_metrics::AccessPoint::ACCESS_POINT_EXTENSION_INSTALL_BUBBLE).

action.name: Signin_ImpressionWithAccount_FromManageCardsBubble

action.description: Recorded when the personalized sign-in promo is shown with an account in the password saved bubble. (signin_metrics::AccessPoint::ACCESS_POINT_PASSWORD_BUBBLE).

action.description: Recorded when starting sign-in using the promo view, with a default account, from recent tabs (signin_metrics::AccessPoint::ACCESS_POINT_RECENT_TABS).

action.name: Signin_ImpressionWithAccount_FromSaveCardBubble

action.name: Signin_Signout_FromUserMenu
action.obsolete: Removed since M85, replaced by a histogram.
action.description: Recorded when the user is signed into Chrome, but not syncing, and clicks the sign out button in the user menu. This is only recorded when Desktop Identity Consistency is enabled.

action.name: Signin_SignoutClearData_FromAccountListSettings
action.description: Recorded when the user signs out and delete user data, from the Account list view. Recorded for iOS only.

action.name: Signin_Undo_Signin
action.description: Recorded when the user chooses to undo (abort) the sign in process. It closes sign in page without signing user in.

action.name: SiteChipPress
action.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
action.description: Please enter the description of this user action.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_CleanupFailureDone
action.description: The user dismissed the Chrome Cleaner webui after a failed cleanup by clicking on the 'Done' button.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_CleanupSuccessDone
action.description: The user dismissed the Chrome Cleaner webui after a successful cleanup by clicking on the 'Done' button.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_HideDetails
action.description: The user closed the details section of the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_LearnMore
action.description: The user clicked the 'Learn more' link on the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_LogsUploadDisabled
action.description: The user disabled logs upload by toggling the permission checkbox in the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_LogsUploadEnabled
action.description: The user enabled logs upload by toggling the permission checkbox in the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_RestartComputer
action.description: The user clicked the 'Restart Computer' button in the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_ShowDetails
action.description: The user opened the details section of the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_Shown
action.description: The Chrome Cleaner webui was shown.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_StartCleanup
action.description: The cleaner started the cleanup operation offered on the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.CleanupWebui_StartScanning
action.description: The cleaner started the scan operation offered on the Chrome Cleaner webui.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog.LogsPermissionCheckbox_Disabled
action.description: The user clicked the logs upload permission checkbox and disabled logs uploading.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog.LogsPermissionCheckbox_Enabled
action.description: The user clicked the logs upload permission checkbox and enabled logs uploading.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog_Accepted
action.description: The user accepted the Chrome Cleaner prompt.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog_Canceled
action.description: The user clicked the cancel button in the Chrome Cleaner prompt dialog.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog_ClosedWithoutUserInteraction
action.description: The Chrome Cleaner prompt dialog was closed without any user interaction. This can happen, for example, if something goes wrong with the Chrome Cleaner IPC or if the user interacts with the Chrome Cleaner webui page from another browser window.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog_DetailsButtonClicked
action.description: The user clicked the 'Details' button in the Chrome Cleaner prompt dialog.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog_Dismissed
action.description: The user dismissed the Chrome Cleaner prompt dialog, for example by clicking the x in the top right corner or pressing the Escape key.

action.name: SoftwareReporter.PromptDialog_Shown
action.description: The Chrome Cleaner prompt dialog was shown to the user.

action.name: SoundContentSetting.MuteBy.DefaultSwitch
action.description: User muted all sites by changing the default sound setting from the content settings privacy page (Desktop) or the SingleCategoryPreferences page (Android).

action.name: SoundContentSetting.MuteBy.PageInfo
action.description: User muted site via the Page Info bubble.

action.name: SoundContentSetting.MuteBy.PatternException
action.description: User muted site via adding/removing a pattern exception from the content settings privacy page (Desktop) or the SingleCategoryPreferences page (Android).

action.name: SoundContentSetting.MuteBy.SiteSettings
action.description: User muted site via the site settings page.

action.name: SoundContentSetting.MuteBy.TabStrip
action.description: User muted site via the tab strip.

action.name: SoundContentSetting.UnmuteBy.DefaultSwitch
action.description: User unmuted all sites by changing the default sound setting from the content settings privacy page (Desktop) or the SingleCategoryPreferences page (Android).

action.name: SoundContentSetting.UnmuteBy.PageInfo
action.description: User unmuted site via the Page Info bubble.

action.name: SoundContentSetting.UnmuteBy.PatternException
action.description: User unmuted site via adding/removing a pattern exception from the content settings privacy page (Desktop) or the SingleCategoryPreferences page (Android).

action.name: SoundContentSetting.UnmuteBy.SiteSettings
action.description: User unmuted site via the site settings page.

action.name: SoundContentSetting.UnmuteBy.TabStrip
action.description: User unmuted site via the tab strip.

action.name: SplitView_DoubleTapDividerSwapWindows
action.description: Recorded when the user double tapped on the split divider to swap windows in tablet mode on Chrome OS.

action.name: SplitView_EndSplitView
action.description: Recorded when the user ended split view mode in tablet mode on Chrome OS.

action.name: SplitView_MultiDisplaySplitView
action.description: Recorded when the number of displays in split view becomes more than one.

action.name: SplitView_ResizeWindows
action.description: Recorded when the user dragged the split divider to resize the windows in tablet mode on Chrome OS.

action.name: SplitView_SnapWindow
action.description: Recorded when a window was just snapped in tablet mode on Chrome OS.

action.name: StackedTab_DragActiveTab
action.description: Recorded when the active tab is dragged while the tabstrip is using a stacked layout. The user performs this action in order to view tabs which are not currently visible within the tabstrip. Note this user action is only recorded for platforms which use the Views toolkit.

action.name: StackedTab_EnteredStackedLayout
action.description: Recorded when the tabstrip begins using a stacked layout for its tabs. This occurs when the user is interacting with the tabstrip using touch and there is insufficient space to be able to display all tabs at a minimum touch-friendly width. Note this user action is only recorded for platforms which use the Views toolkit.

action.name: StartSurface.Shown

action.name: StartSurface.SinglePane
action.obsolete: Split in StartSurface.SinglePane.Home and StartSurface.SinglePane.Tabswitcher.
action.description: The single-pane start surface is shown (the user taps the tab switcher button or on Chrome start).

action.name: StartSurface.SinglePane.MoreTabs

action.name: StartSurface.SinglePane.Tabswitcher

action.name: StartSurface.TasksOnly
action.description: The tasks only start surface is shown (the user taps the tab switcher button or on chrome start).

action.name: StartSurface.TrendyTerms
action.description: The trendy terms start surface is shown (the user taps the tab switcher button or on Chrome start).

action.name: StartSurface.TrendyTerms.TapTerm
action.description: The user tapped a trendy term.

action.name: StartSurface.TwoPanes
action.description: The two panes start surface is shown (the user taps the tab switcher button or on chrome start).

action.name: StartSurface.TwoPanes.BottomBar.TapExploreSurface
action.description: The user taps the explore button on the two panes start surface.

action.name: StartSurface.TwoPanes.BottomBar.TapHome
action.description: The user taps the home button on the two panes start surface

action.name: StartSurface.TwoPanes.DefaultOnExploreSurface
action.description: The two panes start surface is shown with explore surface visible by default.

action.name: StartSurface.TwoPanes.DefaultOnHomeSurface

action.name: StatusArea_Cast_Detailed
action.description: Counts the number of times the user has clicked on the "Cast desktop to" status tray item and is now in the detail view to select a cast receiver.

action.name: StatusArea_Cast_Detailed_Launch_Cast
action.description: Counts the number of times the user has initiated a cast from the system tray. This does not mean the cast has actually begun, as the user still has to select what to cast (ie, the desktop or a tab) and they may cancel the process.

action.name: StatusArea_Cast_StopCast

action.name: StatusArea_Display_Default_Selected
action.description: Counts the number of times the user selects the display row in the system menu. This action does not always open the display settings, e.g. if the row is slected from the lock screen. Use the StatusArea_Display_Default_ShowSettings metric to see how often the settings are actually launched.

action.name: StatusArea_Display_Default_ShowSettings
action.description: Counts the number of times the display settings are opened as a result of the user selecting the display row in the system menu.

action.name: StatusArea_Display_Notification_Created
action.description: Counts the number of times a new display notification is added to the notification center.

action.name: StatusArea_Display_Notification_Selected
action.description: Counts the number of times the user selects the display notification. This action does not always open the display settings, e.g. if the notification is selected from the lock screen. Use the StatusArea_Display_Notification_Show_Settings metric to see how often the settings are actually launched. Note these notifications are managed by the notification center.

action.name: StatusArea_Display_Notification_Show_Settings
action.description: Counts the number of times the display settings are opened as a result of the user selecting the display notification. Note these notifications are managed by the notification center.

action.description: User swiped a card away in the content suggestions UI.

action.description: User dismissed a content suggestions category.

action.description: User requested fetching more content suggestions.

action.obsolete: Removed with deprecation of Download suggestions category.

action.name: Suggestions.Content.Opened
action.description:
User opened a content suggestion.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: Suggestions.ContextMenu
action.description: Android: User used the context menu to download a suggested item on the new tab page.

action.name: Suggestions.Contextual.Carousel.Scrolled
action.obsolete: Deprecated with new contextual suggestions implementation.
action.description: Android: The contextual suggestions carousel in Chrome Home was scrolled by the user.

action.name: Suggestions.Contextual.Carousel.Shown
action.obsolete: Deprecated with new contextual suggestions implementation.
action.description: Android: The contextual suggestions carousel in Chrome Home was shown to the user.

action.name: Suggestions.ContextualSuggestion.Open

action.description: Android: A contextual suggestion in the carousel in Chrome Home was opened by the user.

action.name: Suggestions.ExpandableHeader.Collapsed
action.description: The suggestions section is collapsed through the section header.

action.name: Suggestions.ExpandableHeader.Expanded
action.description: The suggestions section is expanded through the section header.

action.name: Suggestions.FirstTimeSurfaceVisible
action.description: Recorded right before Suggestions.SurfaceVisible when this is the first time a suggestions surface is made visible to the user on that device.

action.name: Suggestions.ScrolledAfterOpen
action.description: Android: Recorded the first time the user scrolls after opening the suggestions UI.

action.name: Suggestions.Site.RemovalUndone
action.description: User reverted the removal of a suggested site.

action.name: Suggestions.Site.Removed
action.description: User removed a suggested site.

action.name: Suggestions.SurfaceFullyVisible
action.obsolete: Deprecated with Chrome Home ramp down.
action.description: ChromeHome: The Suggestion surface is loaded or brought in the foreground in its fully visible state. In regular Chrome, MobileNTPShown is the equivalent.

action.name: Suggestions.SurfaceHalfVisible
action.obsolete: Deprecated with Chrome Home ramp down.
action.description: ChromeHome: The Suggestion surface is loaded or brought in the foreground in its half visible state. In regular Chrome, MobileNTPShown is the equivalent.

action.name: Suggestions.SurfaceHidden
action.description: User closed the content suggestions UI.

action.name: Suggestions.SurfaceVisible
action.description: User opened the content suggestions UI.

action.name: Suggestions.Tile.RemovalUndone
action.obsolete: Deprecated as of 05/2017. Now recorded as "Suggestions.Site.RemovalUndone".
action.description: Android: User tapped the undo button in the snackbar after removing a suggested item.

action.name: Suggestions.Tile.Tapped
action.description: User tapped on a tile in the content suggestions UI.

action.name: Suggestions.Tile.Tapped.GridTabSwitcher
action.description: User tapped on a suggestions tile while viewing the tab switcher. Android-only.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ApprovalGranted
action.description: Emitted when the custodian locally approves the supervised user's request to install an extension by entering the custodian's password.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ApprovalRemoved
action.description: Emitted when the supervised user removes an extension.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_Disabled
action.description: Emitted when a supervised user successfully disables an extension.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_Enabled
action.description: Emitted when a supervised user successfully enables an extension.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ExtensionInstallDialog_AskedParent
action.description: Emitted when a supervised user clicks "Ask a parent" on the Extension Install Dialog.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ExtensionInstallDialog_ChildCanceled
action.description: Emitted when a supervised user clicks "Cancel" on the Extension Install Dialog.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ExtensionInstallDialog_Opened
action.description: Emitted when a supervised user tries to install an extension from the Chrome Web Store and opens the Extension Install Dialog.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_FailedToEnable
action.description: Emmitted when a supervised user tries to enable a force-disabled extension and fails.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_NewExtensionApprovalGranted
action.obsolete: Renamed to SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ApprovalGranted.
action.description: Emitted when the custodian locally approves the supervised user's request to install an extension by entering the custodian's password.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_NewVersionApprovalGranted
action.obsolete: Renamed to SupervisedUsers_Extensions_PermissionsIncreaseGranted.
action.description: Emitted when the supervised user approves a new version of an existing extension.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ParentPermissionDialog_Opened
action.description: Emitted when a supervised user tries to enable an extension that requires parent approval, and opens the Parent Permission Dialog.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ParentPermissionDialog_ParentApproved
action.description: Emitted when a parent successfully types their password and approves the extension on the Parent Permission Dialog.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ParentPermissionDialog_ParentCanceled
action.description: Emitted when a parent cancels the Parent Permission Dialog, denying the supervised user's attempt to enable an extension.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_PermissionsIncreaseGranted
action.description: Emitted when the supervised user approves a new version of an existing extension with increased permissions.

action.name: SupervisedUsers_Extensions_Removed
action.obsolete: Renamed to SupervisedUsers_Extensions_ApprovalRemoved.
action.description: Emitted when the supervised user removes an extension.

action.obsolete: Deprecated due to removal.
action.description:
Emitted when the user uses the tab strip context menu and selects "Reopen Closed Tab". This interaction also causes the user action RestoreTab to be emitted.
Note: if the last user action was to close an entire window with multiple tabs, this "Reopen Closed Tab" action will cause the entire window to be restored, containing multiple tabs. This user action is only emitted once however, regardless of the number of tabs.

action.name: WrenchMenu_Bookmarks_ContextMenu_OpenAll
action.description:
The user opened one or more bookmarks in the Bookmarks Bar using the context menu. Distinguished from launching from e.g. the application menu or the bookmark manager. This is for opening bookmarks normally (in the same window).
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: WrenchMenu_Bookmarks_ContextMenu_OpenAllIncognito
action.description:
The user opened one or more bookmarks in the Bookmarks Bar using the context menu. Distinguished from launching from e.g. the application menu or the bookmark manager. This is for opening bookmarks in an incognito window.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: WrenchMenu_Bookmarks_ContextMenu_OpenAllInNewWindow
action.description:
The user opened one or more bookmarks in the Bookmarks Bar using the context menu. Distinguished from launching from e.g. the application menu or the bookmark manager. This is for opening bookmarks in a new window.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: WrenchMenu_Bookmarks_LaunchURL
action.description:
The user opened a bookmark from the wrench/application/three-dot menu. Distinguished from launching from e.g. the bookmarks bar or bookmark manager.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: WrenchMenu_OpenRecentTabFromDevice
action.description:
Hot Dog Menu: Recent Tabs: Open a recent tab from a device.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: WrenchMenu_OpenRecentTabFromLocal
action.description:
Hot Dog Menu: Recent Tabs: Open a recent tab link from local.
This user action is of special interest to the chrome-analysis-team@. Do not change its semantics or retire it without talking to them first.

action.name: WrenchMenu_OpenRecentWindow
action.description: Hot Dog Menu: Recent Tabs: Open a recent tab in a new window.

action.name: XR.ARCoreDeviceProviderFactory.NotInstalled
action.description: Raised when XR service was unable to obtain necessary component. The action is not directly raised by the user's behavior as it should only be logged when the user navigates to a website that uses WebXR Device API, only in case the necessary provider was not installed during browser start-up. Created to assess the impact of the issue causing https://crbug.com/1050470.

suffix.label: Users tapped '+' button on the tab group bottom sheet toolbar causes a new tab to be created in the group.

suffix.name: TabStrip
suffix.label: Users tapped '+' button on the tab strip, causing a new tab to be created in the group.

suffix.name: GridTabSwitcher
suffix.label: Users tapped 'x' button on the tab in grid layout TabSwitcher, causing a tab to be closed.

suffix.name: GridTabSwitcher
suffix.label: Users tapped the currently selected tab in grid layout TabSwitcher.

suffix.name: TabGridSheet
suffix.label: Users tapped the currently selected tab in tab group bottom sheet.

suffix.name: Dark
suffix.label: Users selected dark theme preference.

suffix.name: Light
suffix.label: Users selected light theme preference.

suffix.name: SystemDefault
suffix.label: Users selected system default theme preference.

suffix.name: GridTabSwitcher
suffix.label: Users swipe to close a tab in grid layout TabSwitcher.

suffix.name: TabGridDialogFromStrip
suffix.label: Users swipe to close a tab in tab grid dialog from tab strip.

suffix.name: TabGridDialogInSwitcher
suffix.label: Users swipe to close a tab in tab grid dialog from grid tab switcher.

suffix.name: TabGridSheet
suffix.label: Users swipe to close a tab in tab group bottom sheet.

suffix.name: DropToMerge
